info.title: SuperRoo Cloud API
info.description:
RESTful API for the SuperRoo Cloud Dashboard — job queue management, agent orchestration, Telegram bot integration, ML engine sync, multi-tenant organizations, monitoring, and IDE workspace management.

Base URL: http://<host>:8787

All endpoints are also accessible with an /api prefix (e.g., /api/health).

## Authentication

Most endpoints require a Bearer token obtained from POST /auth/login or POST /auth/register.

```
Authorization: Bearer <session_token>
```

## WebSocket Endpoints

- `/api/ws/chat?sessionId=<id>` — AI Chat
- `/api/ws/lsp?lang=<language>` — LSP Bridge (IntelliSense)
- `/api/ws/telegram` — Telegram Bot real-time events
- `/api/ws/dashboard` — Dashboard real-time updates
